downstream_consumers_note: grep confirms no module outside agents/query/synthesizer.py and its own test file calls synthesize_answer() yet; topic_selector.py only has a forward-reference comment ('mapping file_ids back to file content for synthesizer prompt is left to a later subtask'), no actual call site. Zero risk of breaking existing callers.
api_surface_changes: none -- no changes to synthesizer.py's public API (SynthesizerResult, unknown_citations(), synthesize_answer(), SynthesizerError, SynthesizerParseError all unchanged)
risk_rationale: Purely additive new test file exercising already-shipped, already-partially-tested behavior (unknown_citations()) in a dedicated end-to-end scenario. No production code path touched.
